title: Aragallus nothoxys
taxonomy: Aragallus nothoxys is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is native to North America, specifically the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Aragallus nothoxys is classified as a member of the subfamily Faboideae, which is further divided into various tribes and subtribes. The exact classification within the Faboideae subfamily is not well-defined. Further research is needed to determine its specific placement within the legume family.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis.
